responseMessageContents.text:
All done. The Cloudflare Worker is deployed and fully operational.

**Worker URL:** `https://heavyar-api.heavyar-official.workers.dev`

**Endpoint verification:**

| Endpoint | Status | Response |
|---|---|---|
| `GET /health` | ✅ Live | `{"success":true,"service":"heavyar-api"}` |
| `POST /cloudinary/delete` | ✅ Live | Successfully calls Cloudinary API with signed request |
| `OPTIONS *` | ✅ Live | CORS preflight handled |

**Bound environment variables:**
- `CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME` (plain text)
- `CLOUDINARY_API_KEY` (plain text)
- `CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET` (secret)
- `CLOUDINARY_FOLDER` (plain text)
- `CLOUDINARY_UPLOAD_PRESET` (plain text)

**Files modified:**
- `worker/src/index.ts` — added `CLOUDINARY_UPLOAD_PRESET` to the `Env` interface

**No manual steps required.** Everything is deployed and verified.

responseMessageContents.title: Set up the backend system to handle photos and app status.
responseMessageContents.description: We successfully connected the app's backend services. This update allows the app to securely delete images and check its connection status. All necessary settings have been put in place to ensure the app works smoothly with these new features.
